description: Holded is a cloud business management platform for small businesses and freelancers, covering invoicing, accounting, treasury, inventory, CRM, projects, and HR. It also supports integrations and developer access for automating data exchange with Holded accounts.
summary: Holded exposes a documented REST API at `https://api.holded.com/api/v2` authenticated with a Holded API token, and it documents an MCP server but the scraped docs did not reveal a connect URL or authentication details.
